message:
security: fix CSRF token generation and XSS in coverage reports

- Replace predictable CSRF token generation (timestamp+counter+thread)
  with cryptographically secure /dev/urandom (32 bytes). Fallback mixes
  multiple entropy sources through FNV when urandom unavailable.
- Use constant-time comparison for CSRF double-submit validation to
  prevent timing side-channel attacks.
- Escape HTML in coverage report method/path fields to prevent XSS.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
